positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a majestic soaring eagle catching sunlight, rendered in clean, bold black and white vector art. The eagle is centered, flying upward in a dynamic, powerful silhouette against a gradient sky of warm ochre and pale cerulean blue. Below the eagle, abstract geometric patterns subtly suggest mountain peaks and flowing wind currents. The overall style is highly adaptable for screen printing, featuring sharp lines, strong visual contrast, and ample negative space around the subject. Composition must be central and symmetrical, optimized for textile printing. Flat graphic design aesthetic, high contrast, detailed linework, vector illustration, comic book inking, elegant, vaporwave aesthetic.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, gradient fade, messy lines, low detail, bad anatomy, multiple subjects, noisy, jpeg compression, cartoonish, realism, bokeh
